name: memU
description: memU is a memory framework built for 24/7 proactive agents. It is designed for long-running use and greatly reduces the LLM token cost of keeping agents always online, making always-on, evolving agents practical in production systems. memU continuously captures and understands user intent. Even without a command, the agent can tell what you are about to do and act on it by itself.

tools.name: memorize
tools.description: Save conversations, documents, or knowledge to memory

tools.name: retrieve
tools.description: Search for relevant memories based on a query

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: List all stored memory items for a user

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all memory categories for a user

tools.name: clear_memory
tools.description: Clear all memories for a user

api_key.title: LLM API Key
api_key.description: OpenAI-compatible API key for chat and embedding
